primaryCost.note: Average annual cost of a primary school uniform in England, including PE kit, bag and all required items.

secondaryCost.note: Average annual cost of a secondary school uniform in England, including all required items and specialist kit.

parentDebt.note: Percentage of parents who report going into debt (credit card, overdraft, buy-now-pay-later) to buy school uniform.

sources.name: Child Poverty Action Group
sources.dataset: The Cost of a Child Survey — School Costs Chapter

metadata.methodology: Primary and secondary uniform costs from CPAG annual cost of a child survey, England sample. Includes all school-required items: uniform garments, PE kit, bags, and where required, specialist equipment. Parent debt figures from Citizens Advice back-to-school survey. Costs are averages and conceal significant variation by school policy.
knownIssues: Average costs conceal huge school-level variation — some schools with mandatory branded items cost significantly more
The School Uniform Regulations 2022 require schools to limit branded items, but compliance monitoring is light
Second-hand uniform schemes reduce actual expenditure for some families — surveys capture intended rather than actual spend
